name: shippath-data-engine
title: ShipPath Data Engine
description: Scrapes USDA FSIS meat and poultry facilities by state. Outputs to Apify dataset for import into Google Sheets.

states.title: States to scrape
states.description: List of 2-letter state codes to scrape. Example: ["GA", "TN", "MS"]

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max requests
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Safety limit on total requests. Increase for more states.
